// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-28701 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-29T02:41:51Z

items.title: CVE-2026-12415: The Invoice Generator plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation due to a missing capability check on th
items.description: The Invoice Generator plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation due to a missing capability check on the pravel_invoice_edit_account() AJAX action in versions up to, and including, 1.0.0. The handler is exposed via wp_ajax_nopriv_pravel_invoice_edit_account, accepts an attacker-controlled user_id and user_email from POST data, and calls wp_update_user() without verifying authentication, ownership, or a nonce. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to change the email address of any user, including administrators, and then trigger WordPress's password reset flow to gain access to the targeted account.

items.title: CVE-2026-55975: A vulnerability exists in H.View IP cameras that could allow an authenticated user to supply unsanitized XML fields to t
items.description: A vulnerability exists in H.View IP cameras that could allow an authenticated user to supply unsanitized XML fields to the device's certificate generation interface, which are incorporated into a backend certificate creation command without proper input validation. This may allow for command execution with elevated privileges during certificate generation.

items.title: CVE-2026-31928: The DMP-5000 devices are shipped with a default administrative web account with weak authentication controls, which are
items.description: The DMP-5000 devices are shipped with a default administrative web account with weak authentication controls, which are not required to be changed during initial configuration or operation. Using these accounts provides full system access.

items.title: CVE-2026-8095: The Frontend File Manager Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authenticated Arbitrary File Deletion in versions
items.description: The Frontend File Manager Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authenticated Arbitrary File Deletion in versions up to and including 23.6. This is due to a case-sensitive bypass of the wpfm_dir_path parameter sanitization in the wpfm_file_meta_update AJAX handler, where supplying WPFM_DIR_PATH in uppercase evades the unset check and is normalized to wpfm_dir_path by sanitize_key() during update_post_meta(), allowing an attacker to overwrite the stored file path with an arbitrary filesystem path that is then passed directly to unlink() in delete_file_locally() without any directory containment validation. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers with Subscriber-level access to delete arbitrary files on the server, including sensitive files such as wp-config.php, potentially leading to full site takeover.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-13486 A vulnerability was determined in SourceCodester Class and Exam T
id: a1921de1-ad75-5a35-b051-56469ed863b4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-13486 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13486
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/29
modified: 2026/06/29
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-13486 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-29T02:41:51Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-13486", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-13486 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1901572; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-29, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-13485", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-13485 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9988423; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-29, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-56414: A vulnerability exists in H.View IP cameras certificate-related upload interfaces allow authenticated users to store arb
items.description: A vulnerability exists in H.View IP cameras certificate-related upload interfaces allow authenticated users to store arbitrary file content to fixed, persistent filesystem locations without validating file type, structure, or size. This design omission enables the placement of unexpected or malformed data in locations intended for trusted certificate material, which could affect system integrity or behavior even after reboot.

items.title: CVE-2026-13333: The Groundhogg  CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection
items.description: The Groundhogg CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via 'query[select]' Parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.5 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Sales Representative-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database. The sanitized Contact_Query code path can be bypassed by supplying an invalid filter type (e.g., query[filters][0][0][type]=invalid_filter_nonexistent), causing a FilterException to be caught and execution to fall through to the unsanitized Legacy_Contact_Query path.
items.apex_ai_summary: [MEDIUM] CVE advisory. Risk score 6.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.title: CVE-2026-33560: The DMP-5000 file service exposes authenticated arbitrary file upload functionality. There are exposed endpoints which a
items.description: The DMP-5000 file service exposes authenticated arbitrary file upload functionality. There are exposed endpoints which allows authenticated users to upload files of any type without validation. No file extension filtering or content inspection is enforced which allows executable binaries and scripts to be accepted and written directly to the server.
